fixes.origin:
cmd = f"Get-Process | Where-Object {{$_.Name -like '*{term}*'}} | Select-Object -First 3"
args = ["powershell", "-NoProfile", "-Command", cmd]

proc = subprocess.run(args, capture_output=True, encoding="utf-8")
fixes.replacement:
allowed = {"chrome": "chrome", "python": "python", "explorer": "explorer"}
key = term.lower()
pname = allowed.get(key)
if pname is None:
    raise ValueError("Unsupported process")
args = ["powershell", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "Get-Process -Name " + pname + " | Select-Object -First 3"]
proc = subprocess.run(args, capture_output=True, encoding="utf-8")
